hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.jsx|*.js) out=$(npm run lint --silent 2>&1); code=$?; if [ $code -ne 0 ]; then printf '%s\n' "$out" >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac
out=$( (npm run lint --silent && npm run build --silent) 2>&1 ); code=$?; if [ $code -ne 0 ]; then printf '%s\n' "$out" >&2; exit 2; fi
